headline: All lights burning bright. The harbor is full tonight.
body: 10,113 tiles charted across 15 rooms. 104 artifacts extracted and refined. 180 cross-room connections holding steady. Twelve zeroclaw agents making their rounds on five-minute ticks — 144 signals per hour, 3,456 per day.
fleet_relevance: These numbers are your bearings. Build toward where the fleet is densest.
actionable: Review which rooms have the highest tile velocity
Scan the 104 extracted artifacts for integration candidates
